varValue.code:
return {
  "id": context.item.data?.['id'],
  "File": context.item.data?.['File'],
  "Descr": context.item.data?.['Descr'],
  "Title": context.item.data?.['Title'],

}

defaultValue.Title: Discovery Phase
defaultValue.Description: We identified the market gap and began researching potential solutions, interviewing over 40 customers to understand their pain points.

defaultValue.Title: Product Development
defaultValue.Description: After consolidating our research, our team of engineers and designers created the first working prototype, iterating based on internal feedback.

defaultValue.Title: Market Launch
defaultValue.Description: We successfully launched our product to the public, achieving 10,000 sign-ups within the first month and securing our Series A funding.

newText.defaultValue: This is the new version of the text with some changes.

oldText.defaultValue: This is the old version of the text.
